The Sun is in Aries exalted, the

Saturn governing profession is

follow bis grand father's profession. Sat.
He will be charitable in nature and
will have good morals. This combination also shows that the native's
physical body is windy in temperament. He will have children and grand
children and live upto 75 years. As the Sun has Venus-Mercury combination
next to him, he will have 3 to 4 children including daughters.
